verses.text: At dawn the women come; an angel rolls back the stone, his face like lightning, and the keepers fall as dead. Heaven's herald. The grave is opened not to free Christ but to show He is gone.

At dawn the women come; an angel rolls back the stone, his face like lightning, and the keepers fall as dead. Heaven's herald. The grave is opened not to free Christ but to show He is gone.
'Fear not... he is not here: for he is risen, as he said'; go tell the disciples. The great news. The empty tomb proclaims the living Saviour.
'Fear not... he is not here: for he is risen, as he said'; go tell the disciples. The great news. The empty tomb proclaims the living Saviour.
'Fear not... he is not here: for he is risen, as he said'; go tell the disciples. The great news. The empty tomb proclaims the living Saviour.
They run with fear and joy; Jesus meets them, 'All hail... be not afraid'; tell my brethren. The risen Lord. He greets His own and calms their fear.
They run with fear and joy; Jesus meets them, 'All hail... be not afraid'; tell my brethren. The risen Lord. He greets His own and calms their fear.
They run with fear and joy; Jesus meets them, 'All hail... be not afraid'; tell my brethren. The risen Lord. He greets His own and calms their fear.
The watch report it, but the priests bribe them to say the disciples stole Him. Bought lie. They suppress the truth they cannot deny.

In Galilee the eleven worship, though some doubt; Jesus says, 'All power is given unto me in heaven and in earth.' Sovereign Lord. The risen Christ holds all authority.

In Galilee the eleven worship, though some doubt; Jesus says, 'All power is given unto me in heaven and in earth.' Sovereign Lord. The risen Christ holds all authority.
'Go ye therefore, and teach all nations, baptizing them'; teach them to obey all He commanded; 'lo, I am with you alway.' The Great Commission. The church goes out with His presence and promise.
